creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
The py-xlib code has some problems running in a modern
	environment. It refers to modules that don't exist any more,
	is missing encoding declerations, and needs a buffer bumped.

Fix: Update the port to use the attached patch. These patches have been forwarded
	to the py-xlib developers as well.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try running py-xlib with the current python port, on a modern system.
